headline: 2 things actually need you today — the rest is mostly noise you can clear in a minute.

importantUrgent.subject: Re: CA service queue — need your call before 11am
importantUrgent.why: Your COO is waiting on a decision to unblock the Canada queue; she flagged it time-sensitive.
importantUrgent.action: Reply with a go/no-go on the escalation path.
importantUrgent.suggestedReply: Hi Rebecca — going with option B (route CA overflow to the AU night shift for this week). I'll brief Courtney this morning so the queue clears by EOD. Will confirm once it's live.

importantUrgent.subject: Deal 'Melbourne Airport — 12 booths' past due OPD
importantUrgent.why: A live deal's estimated delivery date passed with no reschedule — customer may chase.
importantUrgent.action: Push the OPD or note the payment blocker on the ticket.

starredOverdue.subject: Customisation spec — Perth split ticket
starredOverdue.context: You starred this 6 days ago and haven't replied; Courtney owns the customisation and is waiting.
starredOverdue.suggestedReply: Hey Courtney — sorry for the lag on this. The split looks right; go ahead and raise the Inflow SO for the swap and I'll approve today.

needsFollowUp.subject: Payment reconciliation — 3 tickets marked paid
needsFollowUp.suggestedReply: Thanks Teya — confirming receipt. I'll flip the three tickets to Approved for Scheduling this afternoon.

needsFollowUp.subject: Driver report needs a serial number
needsFollowUp.suggestedReply: Hi — the serial for that install is on the wrap-up photo I forwarded. Re-sending now; let me know if it doesn't come through.

whatsNew.subject: Your weekly workspace digest
whatsNew.why: Routine product digest — no action, just FYI.

whatsNew.subject: New workspace collaboration features
whatsNew.why: Product update for review when you have time.

canUnsubscribe.subject: 🔥 5 growth hacks you're not using (open now!)
canUnsubscribe.reason: Promotional blast you've never opened in 40+ sends.

canUnsubscribe.subject: Today only: 60% off everything
canUnsubscribe.reason: Daily marketing email, high volume, no engagement.

canUnsubscribe.subject: Last chance for early-bird pricing
canUnsubscribe.reason: Event you didn't register for; link-based opt-out.

keepSubscriptions.subject: The state of AI assistants, mid-2026
keepSubscriptions.why: You open this most weeks — worth keeping, just file it.

keepSubscriptions.subject: How top PMs run their inbox
keepSubscriptions.why: Regularly read; keep and archive under Subscriptions.

cleanedUp.subject: Accepted: Weekly AU Ops sync
cleanedUp.reason: Auto-notification, already actioned — safe to ignore.

cleanedUp.subject: Response recorded: Installation checklist
cleanedUp.reason: Confirmation receipt with no follow-up needed.
